creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-22 13:47:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/apache-solr Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Solr is an open source enterprise search server based on the Lucene
  Java search library, with XML/HTTP and JSON APIs, hit highlighting,
  faceted search, caching, replication, a web administration interface
  and many more features. It runs in a Java servlet container such as
  Tomcat.
  
  WWW:    http://lucene.apache.org/solr/
  
  PR:             ports/132665
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1318    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/textproc/apache-solr/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/apache-solr/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/textproc/apache-solr/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +137 -0    ports/textproc/apache-solr/pkg-plist (new)
